page_header.label: MERCHANTS
page_header.title: Private Payment Processing
page_header.description: Embed the ZKIRA payment widget. Customers pay through stealth addresses. Business revenue stays confidential.

paragraphs: Accepting crypto payments means publishing a wallet address on your site. Anyone can see your revenue, customer count, and transaction patterns.
Embed our payment widget on your site. Each customer payment goes to a unique stealth address. You claim revenue privately, but customers get the familiar checkout experience they expect.
Competitors can't analyze your sales volume. Customers can't see your business wallet. Your revenue streams remain completely confidential while maintaining payment reliability.

items.title: Add Widget to Site
items.description: Integrate ZKIRA widget with 3 lines of code. Works with any e-commerce platform.

items.title: Customer Clicks "Pay"
items.description: Familiar payment flow. Customer sees product price and payment options.

items.title: Payment Goes to Stealth Address
items.description: Customer payment secured in escrow. No connection to your business wallet visible.

items.title: Merchant Claims Privately
items.description: Claim revenue to your wallet. Customer fulfilled, payment secured, privacy maintained.

items.title: Revenue Privacy
items.description: Competitors can't track your sales volume, customer count, or revenue trends.

items.title: Easy Integration
items.description: Add private payments to any site with 3 lines of code. No backend changes required.

items.title: Customer Experience
items.description: Familiar checkout flow. Customers don't need to change their payment behavior.
